name: Easy Valve Starter Set
summary: The Easy Valve Starter Set provides all the necessary components for a complete Volcano Classic or Volcano Digital Vaporiser experience.
description: The Easy Valve Starter Set provides all the necessary components for a complete Volcano Classic or Volcano Digital Vaporiser experience. The Mouthpiece offers a seamless vapour flow and the Balloons are scent-free, food-grade, and heat-resistant for effortless usage. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
